source_data_summary.ground_truth: Planted: South/Product_B March Revenue 22,216 (41% drop from Feb 37,655). Data quality: February stored as '02', March stored as 'Mar' — inconsistent formats.

agent_plan: Computing totals from data. Will compare totals from March and February by region and product.

tools_called: isin() mask for multiple month formats
steps.output: 18 February rows isolated (matched '02','2','February','Feb'). 18 March rows isolated (matched '03','3','March','Mar'). Inconsistency detected and handled.

Feb revenue 666,408 → Mar 638,957 (-27,451, -4.1%). Units -141 (-5.3%). Avg price +1.3%. North improved +12,875 (+5.7%). South -18,871 (-9.2%). West -21,455 (-9.2%). Product_B biggest drag -17,020 (-14.1%). Biggest negative mover: South/Product_B Revenue_Feb 37,655 → Revenue_Mar 22,216 (-15,439, -41.0%), Units_Feb 149 → Units_Mar 56 (-93, -62.4%).

conclusion: March underperformed. Decline in South and West. South/Product_B single biggest negative driver.
